query_normalized: evaluating the sensitivity of regression models to outlier removal strategies statistics
rationale: This paper focuses on overparameterized OLS regression and benign overfitting theory, not on sensitivity to outlier removal strategies. While both involve regression models, the core mechanism being studied (overparameterization effects vs. outlier removal sensitivity) is distinct, and leave-k-out formulas here refer to cross-validation in overparameterized settings rather than outlier removal specifically.
